items.title: Late Call-In / Attendance Discipline
items.answer: Collect: scheduled start time, actual call time, who was called, whether sick code used, prior occurrences, written discipline, and what standard management claims.

items.title: Investigation / Disciplinary Meeting (representation + deadlines)
items.answer: Collect: date/time of meeting notice, exact allegations, whether rep requested/denied, any written notice, and who attended.

items.title: Suspension / Termination / Discharge
items.answer: Collect: date of suspension/termination, exact reason given, any written notice, length of suspension, prior discipline in same series, whether Weingarten rights were offered, and whether progressive discipline was followed.

items.title: Safety / Incident / ARC Review
items.answer: Collect: route, bus number, speed, conditions, video existence, what mitigation was taken, ARC process steps, and what documents were shown.

items.title: Overtime / Extra Board / Forced Run
items.answer: Collect: date/shift, who was forced, position on OT list, who was above/below on list, whether any exceptions apply, any written OT policy, and supervisor name.

items.title: Seniority Violation / Bid / Run Assignment
items.answer: Collect: member's seniority date, name/seniority of junior employee given preference, what run/shift was involved, bid process details, and any written policy or past practice cited.

items.title: Harassment / Hostile Work Environment / Intimidation
items.answer: Collect: specific incidents with dates/times, exact words used, witnesses present, whether reported to HR/management, any pattern of behavior, and any connection to union activity or protected class.

items.title: FMLA / Medical Leave / Leave of Absence
items.answer: Collect: whether FMLA was applied for/approved, denial reason, dates of leave requested vs denied, any discipline issued for approved leave absences, and any medical documentation provided.

items.title: Pay Dispute / Wage Error / Missing Pay
items.answer: Collect: pay period affected, expected vs actual amount, correct pay rate per contract, whether error reported to payroll, and any prior communication with management about the error.

items.title: Drug / Alcohol Testing
items.answer: Collect: type of test (random, post-accident, reasonable suspicion), date, whether proper protocol was followed, chain of custody documentation, MRO involvement, and any observed behavior cited.

items.title: Run / Route Dispute (not seniority)
items.answer: Collect: which run/route, reason given by management, any written notice, whether other operators were available, contract article cited, and whether this is a pattern.
